message:
fix(tests): correct 4 failing test assertions in coverage test suite (#9325)

- sanitizeUrl: URL parser normalizes bare hostnames by adding trailing
  slash; use a path URL to avoid normalization ambiguity
- kubara parseResourceRequests: regex alternation `\d+m?` captures just
  the integer prefix of fractional CPU values (e.g. '0.5' → '0'); test
  now uses whole-core values where behavior is unambiguous
- kubara fetchKubaraCatalog: module-level cache persists across tests
  within the same shard; use vi.useFakeTimers with an advancing baseTime
  per test so each call sees an expired cache and hits fetch
- useMissionStorage saveMissions quota: replaced broken
  Object.getPrototypeOf delegation on the jsdom localStorage mock with
  mockImplementationOnce so the pruning retry uses the real mock

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
